violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -A box of lettuce was found stored on the floor of the walk-in cooler

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Ice dispenser has build up on the plastic shoot leading into the bin and needs cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustical tile for the drop ceiling is installed above the food prep area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -The walls and fan shrouds for the walk-in cooler are in need of cleaning. There is a dusty build up on fan shrouds and the walls have a residue that need cleaned.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands.-Food service employee was using bare hands while preparing toppings for prep table. i,e. lettuce, onions

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Food items on the floor of the walk in cooler and dry storage. (box of ham, chicken in walk in cooler and napkins in dry storage.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
